specific_question: How much do doctors who work with MediConn earn from a virtual healthcare appointment?
answer: Rates vary depending on the appointment type as well as the specialization and experience level of the doctor. In general, rates can range from $20 CAD to over $2,000 CAD.
dr_question: With the rapid increase in virtual consultations for healthcare visits reported since 2023, what marketing strategies can MediConn Solutions adopt to continue attracting new customers?
